# MuleSoft Confluent Schema Registry Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of Confluent Schema Registry Connector documentation.
> See [Confluent Schema Registry Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/confluent-schema-registry-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Confluent Schema Registry Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Confluent Schema Registry 1.1 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/confluent-schema-registry-connector/latest/confluent-schema-registry-connector-examples.md)
- [Confluent Schema Registry Connector 1.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/confluent-schema-registry-connector/latest/confluent-schema-registry-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Confluent Schema Registry Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/confluent-schema-registry-connector/latest/confluent-schema-registry-connector-studio.md)
- [Confluent Schema Registry - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/confluent-schema-registry-connector/latest/confluent-schema-registry-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Confluent Schema Registry Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/confluent-schema-registry-connector/latest/index.md)
